form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four months. Finished off last campaign second last of 9 at Canterbury 5yo+ Bm72 December 19 over 1200m, 7 len behind Zulfiqar with 60kg at $13. First up last campaign third of 8 at Wyong Prov Bm68 October 30 over 1000m, 0.5 len behind Oceans One carrying 61kg at $6. Expecting a bright start to the campaign.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 3rd of 8 at Moranbah Hcp on March 28 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Soopat carrying 60kg at $2.10. Previously second-up 2nd of 8 at Gladstone Hcp on October 25 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Sunnycoast with 61.5kg at $5. Has a solid second-up record and is in the mix.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 8 at Cairns Hcp on March 26 over 1250m, on heavy track; 16 len behind Armour Force carrying 55kg at $61. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at this track Hcp on April 12 over 1000m, slow going 4 len behind Gossip Torque with 55.5kg at $6. No easier this time and not likely to threaten.
